specs.title: cp-000: timeupdate updates progress slider and time display
cp-001: ended resets to ready state rewinds to start
cp-002: loadedmetadata updates duration from actual audio
cp-003: pause play syncs audio state
cp-004: error shows Unable to play generated audio error
cp-005: ShareNetwork icon in chat header toolbar
cp-006: Disabled when no conversation exists opacity-30 cursor-not-allowed
cp-007: Closes other overlays PDF viewer source notes
cp-008: Modal overlay fixed inset-0 black50 background backdrop-blur-sm
cp-009: Click outside closes backdrop click handler
cp-010: Escape key closes keydown event listener
cp-011: Header LinkSimple icon Share Notebook
cp-012: Close button X icon in header
cp-013: Toggle switch custom styled 44px toggle w-11 h-6
cp-014: Label Public sharing
cp-015: Description Anyone with the link can view this notebook conversation
cp-016: Enable calls enableNotebookSharing generates share URL
cp-017: Disable calls disableNotebookSharing
cp-018: Loading state toggle disabled with opacity-50 during API call
cp-019: Read-only input displays full share URL
cp-020: Copy button brand background Copy icon Copy text
cp-021: Copied confirmation Check icon Copied for 2 seconds
cp-022: Lock icon Password protection optional label
cp-023: Text input placeholder Leave empty for no password
cp-024: Optional leaving empty means no password required
cp-025: CalendarBlank icon Expiration date optional label
cp-026: Date input typedate min set to today
cp-027: Optional leaving empty means no expiration
cp-028: Save Settings button full-width calls updateNotebookShareSettings
cp-029: Loading state Saving text disabled button
cp-030: Loading settings Loading share settings centered text on open
cp-031: Notebook icon brand conversation title
cp-032: Metadata Shared by owner date mode indicator
cp-033: Learn mode indicator Learn Mode appended
cp-034: User messages right-aligned white5 background
